name: Lisas Herb Seasoned Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pepperidge Farm herb stuffing, ground finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the mayonnaise and melted butter together.
2. Crush the herb stuffing finely using a fork or meat mallet.
3. Add the crushed herb stuffing to the mayo mixture.
4. Blend in the onion powder and garlic powder until well combined.
5. Dip each chicken breast into the mayo mixture, coating it evenly.
6. Place the coated chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Sprinkle additional herb stuffing crumbs over the chicken breasts.
8. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 1 hour or until the chicken is cooked through.
Note: Do not leave the chicken in the oven unattended for extended periods of time.
